hero.headline: Protect Any Document From Forgery
hero.subheadline: Vertifile creates tamper-proof digital documents with live animated verification stamps. Zero access to your content — total privacy.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to protect any document
howItWorks.label: Process
howItWorks.step1desc: Upload any document — PDF, image, or text file
howItWorks.step2desc: System computes a unique hash without reading content
howItWorks.step3desc: Animated holographic stamp is embedded in the document
howItWorks.step4desc: Download your .pvf file — tamper-proof and verifiable

features.title: Why Vertifile
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade document protection
features.label: Features
features.f1desc: We never read or store your document content. Only a cryptographic fingerprint is processed.
features.f2desc: Every document hash is registered on blockchain for immutable verification.
features.f3desc: Animated holographic stamp that rotates in real-time — impossible to forge.
features.f4desc: Any modification instantly freezes the stamp and marks the document as forged.
features.f5desc: .pvf files open in any browser — no special software needed.
features.f6desc: Works with PDF, images, text files and more. Any file can be protected.

security.label: Security
security.title: 8 Layers of Protection
security.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security that makes forgery mathematically impossible.
security.s1desc: SHA-256 + HMAC digital signature on every document
security.s2desc: Immutable record on Polygon — exists forever
security.s3desc: Prevents screen recordings and replay attacks
security.s4desc: Detects tampering tools, editors, and DevTools
security.s5desc: Freezes stamp when browser developer tools are opened
security.s6desc: Prevents saving, copying, and inspecting the stamp
security.s7desc: CSS and JS guards block printing and PDF export
security.s8desc: Every access attempt is logged with timestamp and IP

footer.description: Tamper-proof digital documents with live animated verification stamps. Zero access to your content.

upload.cardSubtitle: Upload a PDF, image or text file — the system will protect it and return a .pvf file
upload.privacyDesc: The system never reads or stores your document content. It only computes a unique fingerprint and magnetizes the file.
upload.dropMain: Drag a file here or click to select
upload.dropSub: PDF, image (JPG/PNG), or text file — up to 50MB
upload.successDesc: The document is protected and cryptographically signed. Send it to the recipient — only the .pvf file will be accepted.

verify.subtitle: Upload a .pvf file to verify its authenticity
verify.dropMain: Drag a .pvf file here or click to select
verify.verifiedDesc: This document has been verified against the blockchain registry. The stamp is live and valid.
verify.failedDesc: This document could not be verified. It may have been tampered with or is not registered.
verify.blockchainDesc: Each document hash is compared against the immutable blockchain registry. The verification confirms the document has not been modified since it was originally protected.

enterprise.heroSubtitle: Protect diplomas, licenses, medical records, and compliance documents with tamper-proof .pvf files. HMAC-SHA256 integrity, Polygon blockchain anchoring, and complete blind processing.
enterprise.useCasesSubtitle: From universities to financial institutions, Vertifile protects the documents that matter most.
enterprise.educationDesc: Issue verifiable academic credentials that cannot be forged or altered.
enterprise.governmentDesc: Digitize public records with cryptographic proof of authenticity.
enterprise.healthcareDesc: Protect sensitive medical documents while maintaining full HIPAA compliance.
enterprise.financeDesc: Secure compliance and audit documents with immutable verification trails.
enterprise.integrationSubtitle: Three simple steps to protect every document your organization produces.
enterprise.step1Desc: Sign up for an enterprise account and receive your organization's API credentials and dashboard access.
enterprise.step2Desc: Drop our lightweight SDK into your existing workflow. Available for Node.js, Python, Java, Go, and REST.
enterprise.step3Desc: Every document is automatically converted to a tamper-proof .pvf file with a live animated verification stamp.
enterprise.benefitsSubtitle: Every layer of security designed for organizations that cannot afford compromised documents.
enterprise.blindDesc: Vertifile never reads, stores, or accesses your document content. Hashing is performed entirely client-side before upload.
enterprise.blockchainDesc: Every document hash is anchored to the Polygon blockchain, creating an immutable, publicly auditable proof of authenticity.
enterprise.instantDesc: Recipients verify any .pvf document in under 100ms. No account required, no software to install. Just drag, drop, and verify.
enterprise.antiForgeryDesc: Live animated holographic stamps embedded in every .pvf file. Impossible to replicate with screenshots or copies.
enterprise.gatewayApiDesc: RESTful API with webhook support for automated document protection workflows. Process thousands of documents per minute.
enterprise.whiteLabelDesc: Customize stamps, verification pages, and emails with your organization's branding. Your identity, our infrastructure.
enterprise.performanceSubtitle: Numbers that speak for themselves. Built for reliability at enterprise scale.
enterprise.devExperienceSubtitle: Integrate document protection into your existing systems with just a few lines of code.
enterprise.gatewaySubtitle: Automated document intake and verification for organizations processing thousands of credentials.
enterprise.gatewayIntakeDesc: Accept, verify, and route protected documents from external parties automatically. No manual review required for verified files.
enterprise.gatewayFeature1: Bulk document upload via API or SFTP with automatic verification on ingestion
enterprise.gatewayFeature2: Instant pass/fail verification results with detailed integrity reports
enterprise.gatewayFeature3: Webhook callbacks for real-time integration with your ERP, SIS, or CRM systems
enterprise.gatewayFeature4: End-to-end encryption with zero-knowledge architecture for maximum data privacy
enterprise.plansSubtitle: Contact us for a custom plan tailored to your organization's document protection needs.
enterprise.contactSubtitle: Tell us about your organization and a member of our team will reach out within 24 hours.
enterprise.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your document protection needs, estimated volume, and any integration requirements...
enterprise.bottomCtaSubtitle: Join organizations worldwide that trust Vertifile to protect their most important records.
enterprise.footerDesc: Enterprise-grade document protection with tamper-proof .pvf files, blockchain verification, and complete blind processing.

integration.heroSubtitle: Integrate tamper-proof document protection into your application with a simple REST API. Protect, verify, and manage documents programmatically.
integration.quickStartDesc: Get up and running with Vertifile in three steps. Protect your first document in under five minutes.
integration.step1Desc: Sign up for a Vertifile organization account and generate an API key from your dashboard settings.
integration.step2Desc: Install our official SDK for Node.js or Python, or use the REST API directly with cURL.
integration.step3Desc: Upload any file to create a tamper-proof .pvf document with embedded verification.
integration.authDesc: All API requests require authentication via an API key passed in the request header.
integration.authWarning: Keep your API key secret. Never expose it in client-side code or public repositories. Use environment variables to store it securely.
integration.codeExamplesDesc: Full examples for creating protected documents, verifying them, and using the gateway API.
integration.endpointsDesc: Complete reference for all available API endpoints.
integration.webhookDesc: Receive real-time notifications when documents are verified or created.
integration.responsesDesc: Typical JSON responses from the API.
integration.rateLimitsDesc: Rate limits are applied per API key to ensure fair usage for all users.

signup.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.successSubtitle: You're all set. Use this key to authenticate your API requests.
signup.keyWarning: Save this key — it won't be shown again. Store it securely in your application's environment variables.

open.desktopAppDesc: For the best experience, download the dedicated PVF Viewer. Features offline support, batch viewing, and system-level file associations.

demoPage.heroSubtitle: See how PVF document protection works. Upload any file and get a tamper-proof .pvf document instantly. No signup needed.
demoPage.step1Desc: Upload any document — PDF, image, or Word file
demoPage.step2Desc: We create a tamper-proof PVF file with a cryptographic signature

demoPage.successDesc: Your document is now protected with a cryptographic signature. Download it, share it, or open it in the viewer.
demoPage.underTheHoodSubtitle: Every PVF file is a self-contained proof of authenticity that works anywhere, anytime.
demoPage.howCard1: Your document is hashed — we never see its content. Only a unique fingerprint is computed.
demoPage.howCard2: A cryptographic signature proves authenticity. Any tampering is instantly detectable.
demoPage.howCard3: The PVF file is self-contained — it works offline. No internet needed to view or verify.
demoPage.howCard4: Anyone can verify without creating an account. Just open the file or use the share link.
demoPage.ctaSubtitle: Get unlimited document protection, API access, team management, and enterprise features.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.blindSummary: Vertifile never reads, accesses, or stores the content of your documents. We only process cryptographic hashes (fingerprints) of your files. Your document content never leaves your device.
privacy.notCollectDesc: We do not collect, read, store, transmit, or access the content of your documents at any point. Our BLIND processing architecture means that document content is hashed entirely on the client side. Only the resulting cryptographic fingerprint is sent to our servers. It is mathematically impossible to reconstruct document content from a hash.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.warrantyDesc: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

about.heroSubtitle: Making document verification accessible, secure, and privacy-first for everyone.
about.missionSubtitle: We believe every document deserves to be trusted.
about.missionP1: Vertifile was created with a singular purpose: to make document verification accessible, secure, and privacy-first. In a world where digital documents can be easily manipulated, we provide a cryptographic proof of authenticity that anyone can verify instantly.
about.missionP2: Our technology ensures that diplomas, medical records, legal contracts, and official documents can be trusted without question. We do this while maintaining absolute privacy through our BLIND processing architecture.
about.blindBoxDesc: When you upload a document to Vertifile, our system computes a SHA-256 cryptographic hash entirely on your device. Only this one-way fingerprint is sent to our servers. It is mathematically impossible to reconstruct any document content from its hash. Your files, your data, your privacy.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we build.
about.value1Desc: We architected our entire system so we never have access to your document content. Privacy is not a feature — it is the foundation.
about.value2Desc: Eight layers of cryptographic protection, blockchain anchoring, and live anti-forgery stamps make document tampering impossible.
about.value3Desc: Every verification is publicly auditable on the blockchain. Our process is open, our records are immutable, and our integrity is verifiable.
about.value4Desc: Anyone can verify a document — no account needed, no software to install. Just open a .pvf file in any browser, anywhere in the world.
about.originTitle: Built in Israel, for the World
about.originSubtitle: Founded in 2026 to solve document forgery at scale.
about.originP1: Vertifile was founded in 2026 in Israel by a team of security and cryptography experts who saw first-hand the damage caused by document forgery — from fake diplomas to forged medical records and fraudulent contracts.
about.originP2: We built a solution that combines cryptographic signing, blockchain immutability, and live holographic stamps to create a new standard for document trust. Our BLIND processing architecture ensures that privacy is never compromised.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of organizations that trust Vertifile for document security.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have a question, need support, or want to explore a partnership? We would love to hear from you.
contact.formSubtitle: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.enterpriseBannerDesc: Looking for custom plans, API access, or white-label solutions?
contact.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to common questions about Vertifile.
contact.faq1a: A PVF (Protected Vertifile) is a tamper-proof document format that embeds a cryptographic signature and a live animated holographic stamp. It opens in any browser and can be verified by anyone without special software or an account.
contact.faq2a: You can try Vertifile with our free demo that allows up to 5 documents per hour. For unlimited access, API integration, and enterprise features, contact us for custom pricing based on your organization's needs.
contact.faq3a: Yes. Vertifile provides a RESTful API with SDKs for Node.js, Python, Java, and Go. You can protect and verify documents programmatically, set up webhooks, and integrate with your existing systems. Visit our developer documentation for details.
contact.faq4q: Can you see the content of my documents?
contact.faq4a: No. Vertifile uses BLIND processing, which means we never read, access, or store the content of your documents. Only a cryptographic hash (fingerprint) is computed on your device and sent to our servers. It is mathematically impossible to reconstruct a document from its hash.
contact.faq5a: When a document is protected, its cryptographic hash is registered on the Polygon blockchain, creating an immutable, publicly auditable record. During verification, the hash is compared against the blockchain record. Any tampering is instantly detected because the hash will no longer match.
contact.ctaSubtitle: Custom plans, API access, white-label solutions, and dedicated support for your organization.
